ERRORS.unreachable: Anonymous GitHub is unreachable, contact the admin.
ERRORS.request_error: Unable to download the file, check your connection or contact the admin.
ERRORS.not_found: The requested resource could not be found.
ERRORS.not_connected: You must be logged in to perform this action.
ERRORS.not_authorized: You do not have permission to perform this action.
ERRORS.unable_to_connect_user: Unable to connect your account. Please try again later.
ERRORS.user_not_found: The requested user could not be found.
ERRORS.repo_access_limited: Access to repository limited by org.
ERRORS.repo_empty: The source repository is empty on GitHub.
ERRORS.repo_not_accessible: Anonymous GitHub is unable to or is forbidden to access the repository.
ERRORS.repository_not_ready: Anonymous GitHub is still processing the repository, it can take several minutes.
ERRORS.repository_not_accessible: This repository is currently not accessible.
ERRORS.repo_is_updating: Anonymous GitHub is still processing the repository, it can take several minutes.
ERRORS.invalid_repo: The provided repository is not valid.
ERRORS.repoId_not_defined: A repository ID must be provided.
ERRORS.repoUrl_not_defined: The repository URL needs to be defined.
ERRORS.repoId_already_used: The repository ID is already used.
ERRORS.invalid_repoId: The format of the repository ID is invalid.
ERRORS.unsupported_source: The repository source type is not supported.
ERRORS.branch_not_found: The branch of the repository cannot be found.
ERRORS.invalid_commit_format: The commit hash format is invalid. It must be a hexadecimal string.
ERRORS.pull_request_not_found: The requested pull request could not be found.
ERRORS.pull_request_expired: This pull request has expired and is no longer available.
ERRORS.pull_request_not_ready: This pull request is still being prepared. Please try again shortly.
ERRORS.pull_request_not_available: This pull request is currently not available.
ERRORS.invalid_pullRequestId: The pull request ID is invalid.
ERRORS.pullRequestId_already_used: This pull request ID is already in use. Please choose a different one.
ERRORS.repository_not_specified: A repository must be specified for this pull request.
ERRORS.pullRequestId_not_specified: A pull request ID must be specified.
ERRORS.pullRequestId_is_not_a_number: The source pull request ID must be a number.
ERRORS.invalid_terms_format: Terms are in an invalid format.
ERRORS.missing_content: No content was provided to the anonymization preview.
ERRORS.unable_to_anonymize: An error happened during the anonymization process. Please try later or report the issue.
ERRORS.non_supported_mode: The selected anonymization mode is invalid, only download and stream are supported.
ERRORS.invalid_path: The provided path is invalid or missing.
ERRORS.path_not_specified: A file path must be specified.
ERRORS.path_not_defined: The file path has not been resolved yet.
ERRORS.file_not_found: The requested file is not found.
ERRORS.file_not_accessible: The requested file is not accessible.
ERRORS.file_not_supported: The file type is not supported. Anonymous GitHub cannot handle it.
ERRORS.file_too_big: The file size exceeds the limit of Anonymous GitHub.
ERRORS.is_folder: The path points to a folder.
ERRORS.folder_not_supported: The path points to a folder. Please select a file.
ERRORS.unable_to_write_file: Unable to write file on disk.
ERRORS.download_not_enabled: Repository downloads are not enabled on this server.
ERRORS.unable_to_download: The repository could not be downloaded. Please try again later.
ERRORS.s3_config_not_provided: Object storage has not been configured on this server.
ERRORS.stats_unsupported: Statistics are only supported in download mode.
ERRORS.branches_not_found: The requested branch is not found.
ERRORS.readme_not_available: No README for the repository is found.
ERRORS.page_not_supported_on_different_branch: GitHub Pages is served from a different branch than the one selected. Pick the branch that GitHub Pages is configured to use.
ERRORS.page_not_activated: GitHub Pages is not enabled on this repository. Enable it in the repository settings on GitHub before anonymizing.
ERRORS.is_removed: This resource has been removed and is no longer available.
ERRORS.conf_id_used: This conference ID is already in use. Please choose a different one.
ERRORS.conf_start_date_missing: A start date is required for the conference.
ERRORS.conf_end_date_missing: An end date is required for the conference.
ERRORS.conf_start_date_invalid: The start date must be before the end date.
ERRORS.conf_end_date_invalid: The end date must be in the future.
ERRORS.invalid_plan: The selected plan is not valid.
ERRORS.conference_not_found: The requested conference could not be found.
ERRORS.conf_not_found: The requested conference could not be found.
ERRORS.billing_missing: Billing information is required for this plan.
ERRORS.billing_zip_missing: A billing ZIP/postal code is required.
ERRORS.queue_not_found: The specified queue could not be found.
ERRORS.job_not_found: The specified job could not be found in the queue.
ERRORS.error_retrying_job: An error occurred while retrying the job.

WARNINGS.page_not_enabled_on_repo: GitHub Pages is not enabled on this repository. Enable it in the repository's Settings → Pages on GitHub, then refresh.
WARNINGS.page_branch_mismatch: GitHub Pages on this repository is served from the '{{pageBranch}}' branch, but you selected '{{selectedBranch}}'. Switch the branch above to '{{pageBranch}}' to anonymize the Pages site.
WARNINGS.folder_truncated: This folder has more than 10,000 entries; only a partial listing is shown.
WARNINGS.repo_truncated: Some folders in this repository have too many files to be fully listed. Affected folders are marked with a warning icon.
